text: What if your DNA could reveal your true age? Scientists are uncovering the secrets of aging through epigenetic clocks. These clocks measure DNA methylation patterns, helping estimate biological age. Research shows they can indicate how well your body is aging, but it’s not your fate. Instead, it opens doors to understanding and maybe, altering our aging process. Curious about how you can influence your biological age? Follow for more insights!
